clusters.justification: These terms coalesce around the subjective experience, generation, and regulation of emotional valence and physiological arousal, typically defining the functional axis of anterior insula, cingulate, and broader limbic/salience network co-activations.

This domain captures the overarching macro-cognitive processes of utility assignment, cost-benefit computation, and goal-directed choice, which are robustly mediated by mesolimbic and corticostriatal valuation circuitry.

Mapping consistently onto the Default Mode Network, this domain governs internally directed, stimulus-independent processing dedicated to constructing narrative representations of self-identity, episodic memory, and the complex interpersonal models of others.
